Records.description: Two-loop crossed six-line vertex master integral with two massive internal lines (mass mb) and four massless internal lines, with one heavy external leg p1 (p1^2 = mb^2), one light external leg p2 (p2^2 = 0), and an off-shell leg p3 = p1 - p2 with x = (p1-p2)^2/mb^2. The integral is computed analytically through O((D-4)^0) in dimensional regularisation D = 4 - 2*eps using the differential equation technique in x, with Laporta IBP reduction relating the derivative to the integral itself plus 16 simpler masters. The boundary condition at x = 0 is computed independently from a three-fold Mellin-Barnes representation derived from a Feynman-parameter form (Eq. (3.1)), with analytic continuation via the MB package. Result coefficients c^(-4) through c^(0) given in Eqs. (2.6)-(2.8) involve Li_2(x), Li_3(x), ln(1-x), zeta_3, Li_4(1/2), and pi^4 / ln^4 2 / pi^2 ln^2 2 / zeta_3 ln 2 contributions; the boundary value c^(0)|_{x=0} = -167*pi^4/270 confirms a PSLQ conjecture by Bonciani-Ferroglia and Beneke-Huber-Li. As a by-product, three new weight-4 relations among harmonic polylogarithms of the sixth root of unity are derived (Section 4).
Records.location: Section 2, Eq. (2.3); result in Eqs. (2.6)-(2.8); boundary condition in Section 3, Eq. (3.6)
